name: Mi 33W Fast Charger (USB-C)
description: 33W turbo fast charger compatible with Xiaomi, Redmi, and most Android smartphones. Intelligent charging with built-in overvoltage and short-circuit protection. Compact travel-friendly design.

name: Realme 20W Dart Charger
description: 20W Dart fast charger for Realme and other compatible Android phones. Charges from 0 to 50% in just 30 minutes. Safe and certified with multi-protection technology.

name: boAt Bassheads 100 Wired Earphones
description: High-definition sound earphones with powerful 10mm dynamic drivers for deep bass. Tangle-free flat cable with in-line mic for calls. Compatible with all 3.5mm audio jack devices.

name: Noise Shots Neo True Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless Bluetooth 5.0 earbuds with 20-hour total battery life. HD sound with immersive bass, touch controls, and built-in mic for calls. IPX4 water resistant.

name: Type-C Braided Data Cable (1.5m)
description: Heavy-duty braided Type-C data cable for fast charging and data transfer. Supports up to 3A current for quick charge compatibility. Durable nylon braiding prevents tangling and wear.

name: Micro USB Data Cable (1m)
description: Standard Micro USB cable for charging and data sync compatible with older Android phones and accessories. Supports fast charging for compatible devices. Durable PVC casing.

name: Lightning Cable for iPhone (1m)
description: Compatible Lightning cable for iPhone and iPad charging and data transfer. Safe charging with reliable connectors and reinforced stress relief tips. Fast and stable connection.

name: Mi Power Bank 3i (10000 mAh)
description: Compact lightweight 10000mAh power bank with dual USB output and USB-C input. Supports 18W fast charging for compatible devices. 9-layer safety protection included.

name: Tempered Glass Screen Protector
description: 0.33mm ultra-thin tempered glass with 9H hardness rating. Case-friendly design with edge-to-edge protection. Anti-fingerprint and anti-glare coating for clear visibility.

name: OTG Adapter (USB-C to USB-A)
description: Compact On-The-Go adapter that connects USB flash drives, mice, and keyboards to your Type-C smartphone. Supports USB 3.0 speeds for fast data transfer.

name: SanDisk 32GB Memory Card (Class 10)
description: High-speed MicroSD card with Class 10 / UHS-1 rating for smooth 4K video recording and fast app performance. Waterproof, temperature-proof, and X-ray proof for reliable storage.

name: Mobile Back Cover (Silicon)
description: Soft silicon back cover with shock-absorbing edges and precise cutouts for all buttons and ports. Provides all-around protection from drops and scratches. Available for popular models.
